title.rendered: Human Growth Hormone amount, purity and dimer and higher molecular weight proteins analysis

content.rendered:
ID, amount and purity analysis of Human Growth Hormone and dimer and higher molecular weight proteins.

Dimer is when two molecules of Growth hormone join together, decreasing effectiveness and more dimer is associated with more side effects. Dimer is technically Growth Hormone, so purity test doesn’t pick it it up as impurity and separate test is necessary. It is one of prescribed pharma tests.

Only HGH 191 AA is recognized as HGH by the test. HGH 192aa is not considered to be Human Growth Hormone for the purpose of the analysis and would result in „HGH not detected“ on the result sheet.

You can find the test details in the parameters section below.
